channel.title: Aerospace on Toki Tahmid | Digital Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Aerospace on Toki Tahmid | Digital Portfolio

item.title: Applying First Principles to Multidisciplinary Engineering
item.description:
The Fundamental Breakdown
#

In the pursuit of advanced aerospace systems, we often become entirely consumed by the mechanical hardware—thrust, drag, computational fluid dynamics, and material tensile strength. However, any system designed to carry or support human life must ultimately answer to the constraints of biology.

Through my independent studies into anatomy, physiology, and pathology, I have realized that the human body is the most complex mechanical system we will ever encounter.

item.title: The H.O.L.M.E.S. Initiative
item.description:
Here we detail the constitutional framework and primary objectives of the four-founder H.O.L.M.E.S. research group.

Our current focus lies in bridging the gap between theoretical mechanical engineering and practical, aerospace-applicable innovation.
